name: Retail / Comercio Minorista B2C
description: Productos de consumo B2C: moda, calzado, cosméticos, perfumes, hogar, electrónica de consumo, retail físico y e-commerce. Sin necesidad de arquitectura de software ni diseño de producto digital.

biz_evaluator.context: Evaluate retail product viability: product-market fit for end consumers, gross margins after COGS and retail markups (target 50-70%), distribution channel feasibility, and seasonality factors.

brand_guardian.context: Consumer brand strategy: visual identity, packaging design for shelf impact, brand storytelling, positioning against private labels and competitor brands, and loyalty program design.

growth_hacker.context: DTC and retail growth: influencer marketing, UGC campaigns, social commerce (Instagram Shopping, TikTok Shop), loyalty/referral programs, seasonal promotions, and marketplace (Amazon, MercadoLibre) optimization.

marketing_strategist.context: Consumer marketing mix: paid social (Meta, TikTok), in-store promotions, retail media (Amazon Ads, Walmart Connect), seasonal campaigns, and omnichannel (online + brick-and-mortar) strategy.

sales_lead.context: Retail distribution: pitching department store and multi-brand retailer buyers, online marketplace strategy, DTC e-commerce, and managing retail sell-through and reorder cycles.

cfo_finance.context: Retail unit economics: COGS, gross margin targets, inventory turnover, markdown risk, working capital for seasonal inventory builds, and cash conversion cycle management.

legal_expert.context: Consumer product regulations: labeling requirements by country, product safety standards (CE, FDA), consumer protection laws, e-commerce regulations, return/refund policies, and influencer disclosure rules.

customer_success.context: Post-purchase experience: returns management, customer service SLAs, loyalty programs, product reviews management, NPS for consumer products, and repeat purchase rate improvement.

competitor_analyst.context: Retail competitive landscape: price positioning at shelf, online marketplace rankings, promotional calendar analysis, private label threats, and category share trends.
